examples: The thallium content of chook is also lower than safe edible value.
Also they live in open fields where there is lots of edible vegetation.
The meat of the herbivore is, in comparison, far more edible and smell wise.
We spotted the blue flash of a kingfisher, a sure sign that edible fish resided below.
But edible flowers are moving beyond their role as go-to garnish for junior-league luncheons.
